name: Char Vale Vineyards and Winery
seoDescription: Char Vale Vineyards and Winery — a family-run micro-winery in the Green Valley of the Russian River Valley, pouring estate-grown Pinot Noir, Rosé, Riesling and Chardonnay from a renovated farmhouse in Sebastopol.

hero.heading: Estate Pinot Noir from ten acres of Green Valley
hero.subheading: A family-run micro-winery in the Russian River Valley, pouring estate-grown wines from a renovated farmhouse overlooking the vineyard.

images.heroAlt: Char Vale Vineyards and Winery in Sebastopol, CA
images.storyAlt: About Char Vale Vineyards and Winery

about.heading: A Family-Run Operation
body: Char Vale is a family-owned vineyard and winery in the renowned Green Valley of the Russian River Valley appellation in Sonoma County. We farm ten contiguous acres of world-class grape varietals, and our newly renovated tasting room — set in the original family farmhouse — sits just one mile west of Highway 116 on Occidental Road.

Founded in 2014, we are proud to pour award-winning estate Pinot Noir, estate Rosé of Pinot Noir, estate Riesling, single-vineyard Chardonnay and Pinot Gris. As a true micro-winery producing only a small number of cases per varietal, every pour is poured with care.

The vibe at Char Vale is friendly, intimate and unpretentious. Tastings are seated, overlooking or right next to the vines, and the deck facing the vineyard makes the perfect backdrop for a glass of Pinot Noir.

services.title: Estate Pinot Noir
services.description: Our flagship, grown on ten estate acres in the cool Green Valley of the Russian River Valley. Small-lot and award-winning.

services.title: Estate Rosé of Pinot Noir
services.description: A refreshing, vineyard-grown rosé made from our estate Pinot Noir.

services.title: Estate Riesling
services.description: Estate-grown Riesling that reflects Green Valley's cool-climate character.

services.title: Single-Vineyard Chardonnay & Pinot Gris
services.description: Single-vineyard Chardonnay and Pinot Gris rounding out the estate lineup.

services.title: Vineyard Tastings
services.description: Seated tastings overlooking or next to the vineyard, with a deck for taking in the view. Reservations preferred; walk-ins welcome as space allows.

items.quote: Great Pinot, and Rosé, in an unpretentious setting. What California wine tasting should aspire to be.
items.author: Jeffrey P.

items.quote: Wonderful small winery. This is 'boutique' without the snobbery. I really enjoyed the flight of Pinots.
items.author: TripAdvisor reviewer

items.quote: This was a very intimate experience with the staff and owner. We were so glad we discovered Char Vale.
items.author: Donna D.

items.title: Char Vale Vineyards and Winery opened its doors
